verdict.answer_first: B states the immediate first action in sentence 1: "Run this first"; A opens with framing and only later says "run the pg_stat_activity query above while under load".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to one first diagnostic: "Run this first"; A surveys a longer checklist with "Check these in order" and multiple sections.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on immediately because it gives a short state-count query and maps each result to the next step; A is richer but slower to scan.
